evals.prompt: Use $windenergy-reader to turn this wind power forecasting PDF into a full Chinese-English Markdown reader. Do not only summarize it; keep figures and captions near the first substantive mention.
evals.expected_output: A full paper.md with Original/Chinese blocks, source_map.json, translation_notes.md, and assets for figures or tables when extraction is possible.

evals.prompt: Use $windenergy-reader. I only have a DOI for an offshore wind resource paper. Build a reader if possible; if not, tell me what cannot be confirmed.
evals.expected_output: The assistant attempts DOI resolution, separates confirmed metadata or abstract content from unavailable full text, and does not fabricate missing body sections.

evals.prompt: Use $windenergy-reader on a scanned wind farm SCADA paper. OCR is needed; mark uncertain text and keep figure locations.
evals.expected_output: The assistant uses OCR if available or reports the blocker, labels low-confidence text, and preserves page-level source anchors.
